background.description: Background configuration — image, color, or video reference

items.description: Controlled items array. When provided, component is controlled

groups.description: Controlled groups array for annotation grouping

currentMs.description: Current playback position in milliseconds (for timed annotations)

isEditing.description: Whether the canvas is in edit mode (shows toolbar, allows drawing)

toolbarPlacement.description: Position of the drawing toolbar relative to the canvas

defaultTool.description: Initially active tool when the component mounts

defaultToolDefaults.description: Override default stroke color, fill, font settings, etc.

features.description: Feature flags to enable/disable toolbar sections and tools

className.description: Additional CSS class for the root element

style.description: Inline styles for the root element

onItemsChange.description: Fires whenever items are added, modified, or removed

onExport.description: Called when user exports. Enables export buttons when provided

object.description: The drawing object (arrow, rect, circle, text, etc.)

showAtMs.description: Time in ms when this item should appear

hideAtMs.description: Time in ms when this item should hide (null = never)

transition.description: Animation transition for show/hide (none, fade, scale, slide-*)

groupId.description: Optional group membership for batch timing

xPct.description: Horizontal position as fraction (0-1) of canvas width

yPct.description: Vertical position as fraction (0-1) of canvas height

wPct.description: Width as fraction (0-1). Null for point-based items (steps)

hPct.description: Height as fraction (0-1). Null for point-based items (steps)

tools.description: Enable/disable individual tools (select, arrow, rect, circle, etc.)

timing.description: Show timing controls (showAt / hideAt) in toolbar

export.description: Show export buttons (also requires onExport prop)

fontControls.description: Show font family, size, color, bold/italic/underline

roundedCorners.description: Show rounded corners toggle for rectangles

items.description: Timeline items to display as bars

durationMs.description: Total duration of the media in milliseconds

tickCount.description: Number of time ticks to display

defaultItemColor.description: Default color for items without a group color

onSelectItem.description: Called when an item is selected or deselected

onUpdateItem.description: Called when an item is dragged/resized on the timeline

onUpdateGroup.description: Called when a group is modified

onAddGroup.description: Called when the add group button is clicked

onDeleteGroup.description: Called when a group is deleted

onSeek.description: Called when the user clicks on the timeline to seek
